name: Cosmo !
description:
Heh, I'm back at it again. Another Jenset AU character. I love this version of cosmo so much!! It's so refreshing to see like always character design and AU belongs to @reysukaboneka on tiktok

My boys, their so cool fr. Their totally just friendsss. Yes he's 18+ in this AU

You guys should leave reviews and comments fr and totally make your chats public. Flutters my eyelashes

Send me requests here !
